articles.title: Philippines defence chief backs US calls for higher military spending, says allies must pull their weight

articles.title: Nike World Cup Uniforms Made of Recycled Textiles Won’t Solve Fashion Waste
articles.summary: The activewear giant has used chemical recycling to make jersey for 16 teams competing in the tournament. But the technique is unlikely to help solve fashion’s waste issue.
articles.reasoning: The article discusses Nike's strategic initiative to use chemical recycling for World Cup uniforms, highlighting its sustainability goals and the challenges of scalability, which relates to strategic decision-making and corporate governance.

articles.title: Amazon Is Making an AI-Animated ‘Good Advice Cupcake’ TV Show. Its Original Creator Is Furious
